description_long: This object is a standard adhesive bandage, commonly known as a band-aid, with a rectangular central pad and elongated, rounded ends. The surface is a uniform beige color, typical of skin-tone bandages, and the central pad is slightly raised, indicating the absorbent area. The bandage appears to be made of a flexible, semi-soft material, likely a combination of fabric and polymer, with a matte finish. There are no visible logos, text, or decorative graphics, giving it a generic appearance. The adhesive area surrounds the central pad and is subtly distinguished by a faint border. No wrapper or packaging is present, and the bandage is shown as a single, standalone item.
description: A beige, skin-tone adhesive bandage with a rectangular pad and rounded ends, featuring a matte, fabric-like surface and no visible branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile and rounded ends of the bandage.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the rectangular central pad and the full length of the bandage.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the thinness and rounded ends.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view, mirroring view 1, with the central pad and bandage length visible.
attribute_packaging_design: No packaging is visible; the bandage is unwrapped and exposed, with a plain beige color and no graphics or text.
attribute_adhesive_strip_pattern: The adhesive strip area is visually uniform with a faint border around the central pad, no printed markings or perforations are visible.
